{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323191834C0D85CF9B849DA3FCCAB"}"},"total":998},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7231539560718959419","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情比较新颖，写的很精彩，不然真的在我这个喜新厌旧的人的书架里呆不了这么久╮（╯＿╰）╭不过有一点就是，写的有点杂，好像什么都想写，又好像什么都没有写到重点，好多章都拿来铺垫了，看着有点闷，但是，高潮是真的很厉害，让人回味无穷，真的不忍弃文。还有，能能麻烦作者给每一章都写个题目，题目能奠定一篇文章的基调，能让人从看到题目开始就满心期待，增强文章的代入感，而且，因为很多章都是用来铺垫的，所以有的时候想跳过，但是因为没有题目，不敢乱跳，差点就弃文了，但是写的太精彩了，满心不忍。真诚希望作者能改变一下，没有骂人和逼迫的意思，只是客观评价。加油，期待更好的[敬礼][求爆更][爱慕][爱心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1683724112,"group_id":"7125740687571553310","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"风花雪月本闲，而扰攘者自冗","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9RmiVwaD6/AGxmxVjJF+nYRAUBGGq1RczFD6dXrsjeQ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/26b869e39c6742b4904468c388fb1ee6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796293&x-signature=z6g13DEW8G48yZmuTwNDNYVFsOM%3D","user_id":"1865249752627975","user_name":"月老牵错红线了"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1865249752627975","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7125740687571553310","book_info":{"abstract":"【温柔敏感女主播×新晋战队小队长】
——

“你有没有过一个很喜欢的人，那个人像光一样，在任何地方，只要看一眼就会让人沉迷其中。”——夏桉

One.
     /.某天，XAR战队小队长深夜偷偷关注了某平台女主播，并且还与女主播双排，俩人同时登陆一个陌生的账号，进入加载界面时，显眼的情侣标露了出来，粉丝们疯了。

【?????】

【妈妈呀!天神啊!我家让让什么时候恋爱了，杀了我吧。】

【我不信，我眼睛是不是盲了】

【王者出来漏洞了吗？bug??】

【俩人是不是之前就认识了，让让刚进战队的时候一个采访视频，透露出他喜欢过一个人。】

【啊啊啊啊！啊啊啊啊！】

……
是久别重逢，还是破镜重圆?

Two.
    /.雪花纷飞，时让脸颊有点醉意，他软软的靠在夏桉的肩膀上，众人也上惊呆了从来没见过这样的小队长。
夏桉笑了笑，伸手捏了捏他的脸，然后一脸歉意的跟众人道歉:“不好意思，让让他就是一碰酒就醉，出丑了。”
众人“……”
这真的是时让吗？那个清冷孤傲的电竞男神，无数少年的梦中男友怎么是这样一副奶萌的样子?

——夏桉
——时让
是久别重逢也是破镜重圆也是共度余生。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oa820584456a321794984f4626a3938ca~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"鹿枝","author_id":"","book_id":"7125740687571553310","book_name":"奶狗野王在线求安慰","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c8c0c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5021人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":749,"name":"青春甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=749&name=青春甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":475,"name":"破镜重圆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=475&name=破镜重圆&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7126122913907868168","read_count":"5021","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"647293"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"153","tags":"青春甜宠,现代言情,直播,破镜重圆","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c1e290eb5a004202f5bd9b44e2f35180~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779448714&x-signature=Rz4GJnwctw766gE1XdpTH8PiJI4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"52408989544590","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6.151476e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323191834C0D85CF9B849DA3FCCAB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6151,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":9649},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1683724199,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7596689445369234238","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"回看情侣标那里还是很震惊很爽的感觉，名场面啊"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768744938,"group_id":"7125740687571553310","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"198365607888429"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7125740687571553310","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"173"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":28716,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7543322516566655769","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好的电竞文，其中电竞方面的东西我不是很懂，但感觉作者大大写的还是很仔细嘟
男主是奶奶嘟（超可耐）
女主是霸总吧（对男主很宠，也会考虑男主的粉丝，教会了男主也是很多东西）
大家入骨这个小说真的不亏。
对江池的结局还是蛮期待的，也是在大大的书里找到他属于他俩的故事，但好像在连载，已加书架，会追嘟，大大的文写的很好看，可追可追，大家一定要码住[顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756324216,"group_id":"7125740687571553310","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看连载文中，已经沉迷于其中无法自拔了，完结问不出意外的话，过段时间看吧。不行了，开始看完结文了。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9p4B3eaBy9pi2q65WO6O30=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/36f6156c56784547a5e7db49051139ff~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791386&x-signature=XobGLly2cCC4sce2t4Fs3g0dipc%3D","user_id":"198365607888429","user_name":"最近遇到点哥有点多✍"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"198365607888429","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1698400679,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7125740687571553310","book_info":{"abstract":"【温柔敏感女主播×新晋战队小队长】
